scope: M4 onboard emergency and medical response vocabulary draft. Adds casualty status, first-aid actions, evacuation and medical-advice phrases. Draft only: no starter merge and no production deploy.

qa_notes.linguist_note: Medical condition must remain exact.
Bleeding must not be confused with breathing.
Injury type must remain exact.
Fracture is an injury, not fever or equipment failure.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: smoke inhalation / smoke signal / water inhalation
qa_notes.linguist_note: Medical condition must not become signal or observation.
Consciousness polarity is safety-critical.
Evacuation must not become assessment.
Medical carrying equipment must remain exact.
Medical device must not become power equipment.
Medication is not advice or equipment.
First-aid action must preserve action and condition.
Treatment action and item must remain exact.
Monitoring breathing must not become stopping or bleeding.
Stretcher preparation must stay medical.
Medical advice request must remain exact.
Oxygen requirement polarity is safety-critical.
Patient consciousness status must remain exact.
Negative consciousness status must not reverse.
Casualty evacuation must not become evaluation or vessel evacuation.
Medication action must remain exact.
Condition severity and treatment action must remain exact.
Consciousness and breathing status are safety-critical.
Advice type and condition must remain exact.
Medical evacuation equipment and action must remain exact.
Oxygen requirement must preserve patient and polarity.

accepted_answers: Defibrillator is ready on main deck

should_accept: Defibrillator is ready on main deck
should_reject: Defibrillator not ready on main deck
qa_notes.linguist_note: Device, readiness, and location must remain exact.

items.target_text: Do not administer medication without advice.
accepted_answers: Do not administer medication without advice.
Do not give medication without advice

should_accept: Do not administer medication without advice.
Do not give medication without advice
should_reject: Do not administer navigation without advice
Do not request medication without advice
qa_notes.linguist_note: Medication prohibition must not reverse into permission.
Status and monitoring action must remain exact.

should_accept: Evacuate the casualty to port clinic
qa_notes.linguist_note: Evacuation destination and subject must remain exact.
Medical report must preserve count, condition, and subject.

examples: Do not administer medication without advice.
